curated_subfolders.purpose: Curated default credentials, protocol-specific credential packs and normalized mapping sources.
Wordlists curated for in-scope devices and protocol validations.
MIB packages and vendor-focused SNMP support artifacts.
Firmware references and curated metadata for research workflows.
Binary/tool references used by controlled validation workflows.
PoC/PoV research artifacts curated by source and legal scope.
External intel snapshots and ingestion outputs.

ingestion_policy.integrate_core: Assets directly consumable by modules without policy/safety conflicts.
ingestion_policy.catalog_only: Assets requiring additional review, adaptation, or legal/operational validation.
ingestion_policy.reject: Assets out of scope or incompatible with project safety and scope policy.
